# Arcadia Finance MCP Server

> MCP server for managing concentrated liquidity positions with leverage, automated rebalancing, and yield optimization on Base, Optimism, and Unichain.

## Overview

Arcadia Finance is a DeFi protocol for leveraged yield farming. This MCP server exposes the full protocol as tools for AI agents:

- **Account management** — health factor, collateral, debt, positions, PnL, history
- **Lending pools** — TVL, APY, utilization, available liquidity
- **LP strategies** — concentrated liquidity strategies with APY, rebalancing recommendations
- **Transaction building** — unsigned calldata for deposits, borrows, swaps, LP minting/closing
- **Automation** — configure asset managers (rebalancer, compounder) for hands-off management

## Install

```
npx -y @arcadia-finance/mcp-server
```

## Tools

Read: get_account_info, get_account_history, get_account_pnl, get_assets, get_wallet_balances, get_allowance, get_points, get_lending_pools, get_strategies, get_recommendation, get_guide

Write (unsigned tx): build_approve_tx, build_create_account_tx, build_deposit_tx, build_withdraw_tx, build_borrow_tx, build_repay_tx, build_set_asset_manager_tx, build_configure_asset_manager_tx

Advanced (unsigned tx, backend-routed): build_add_liquidity_tx, build_remove_liquidity_tx, build_swap_tx, build_repay_with_collateral_tx, build_close_position_tx, build_position_action_tx

## Links

- Docs: https://github.com/arcadia-finance/mcp-server
- Website: https://arcadia.finance
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@arcadia-finance/mcp-server
